name: eat-dirt-leaky-gut-dr-josh-axe
description: Dr. Josh Axe's Eat Dirt — a comprehensive gut-health toolkit for identifying, treating, and preventing leaky gut syndrome through dietary changes, lifestyle microexposures, and targeted gut-type protocols.
useCase: Helps users diagnose leaky gut, heal their gut lining, identify their specific gut type, apply the 5-step Eat Dirt program, and restore microbiome diversity through microexposures, diet changes, and targeted supplements.
knownRisks: Gut healing can cause temporary detox symptoms (fatigue, headaches, digestive changes) — advise users to push through the initial 1-2 weeks
Patients on prescription medications should not stop them without consulting their doctor
Severe autoimmune conditions require medical supervision alongside functional medicine approaches
Some fermented foods may trigger histamine reactions in sensitive individuals — start with small amounts
